M4.name: Nobody has done this before
M4.notes: Match close variants of the no-anchor / no-prior-work claim class.

M5.name: Vague impact language
M5.notes: Detect the broader 'if we do this, something good will happen' framing — see patterns/M5-vague-impact.md.

M6.name: Over-claiming measurement
M6.notes: Detect direct-measurement claims for inferred or unobservable constructs — see patterns/M6-over-claiming-measurement.md.

M7.name: Uncited factual claims
M7.notes: Detect specific factual claims (dollar figures, percentages, durations, trend statements, comparative market claims) presented without a citation — see patterns/M7-uncited-claims.md.
